Happy 21st
Birthday

To the girl who changed everything 💗

June 25, 2005 — June 25, 2026

Our Story →

⏳ Days since we first met

Our Journey

From August 5, 2022 — Until Forever

August 5, 2022
💫The Day It All Began
The universe conspired for us to meet. That very first moment — I didn't know it yet, but everything was about to change. You walked into my world and quietly became the best part of it.
Early Days
🌅Getting to Know You
Late night conversations, stolen glances, laughing at nothing — the butterflies were real. I was falling and didn't even realize it. Every day with you felt like discovering something new and beautiful.
Airport Days
✈️Adventures Together
Side by side, watching planes take off, the world stretching out before us. You made even the simplest places feel like magic. Every trip, every moment of waiting, every selfie — all gold.
Pool Nights
🌊Starlit Evenings
You in white by the pool, glowing under soft lights — I have that image saved in my heart forever. You are effortlessly breathtaking in every moment, whether you're trying or not.
Villa Getaways
🏝️Our Little Escapes
Those dreamy spaces with sheer curtains and golden light — watching you laugh freely, posing like you own every room (because you do) — these are the moments I hold onto tightest.
Arcades & Fun Days
🎠Your Inner Child
Riding carousels, surrounded by neon colors — watching you light up like the whole world was made just for you. Your joy is contagious. Being with you feels like being a kid again in the best way.
June 25, 2026
🎂Your 21st Birthday
Today you step into a new chapter — 21 years of everything that made you, YOU. And I am so incredibly lucky to be standing beside you for this one. Here's to us, and all the chapters still to come.

A Love Letter

Written From My Heart

June 25, 2026

My dearest love,

Today you turn 21 — and I want you to know that every single year of your life has been building toward the extraordinary person sitting in front of me right now. You are everything.

Since August 5, 2022, you've been my adventure, my peace, and my favorite chapter in a story I never want to finish. I remember the very beginning — how nervous I was, how you made it all seem so easy. That's always been your superpower: making hard things feel effortless just by being near.

I've watched you pose by glowing pools in white dresses and flower in your hair, looking like something out of a dream. I've laughed with you in colorful arcades, been beside you at airports full of possibility, held you in quiet villas where time felt like it stopped. Every version of you — the playful one, the elegant one, the soft one at 2am — I am obsessed with all of them.

You don't always see what I see. You are breathtaking, not just in photographs — but in the way you laugh, in how hard you love, in the fire you carry quietly inside you. Watching you grow has been one of the greatest privileges of my life.

At 21, you are standing at the most beautiful beginning. And I am so incredibly grateful that I get to stand beside you through it all — the adventures, the uncertain days, the ordinary Tuesday afternoons that somehow feel extraordinary because they're with you.

Thank you for choosing me. Thank you for every late night, every trip, every smile you've given me. You are, without question, the best thing in my life.

Happy Birthday, my love. Let's make 21 the most beautiful year yet. 💗

Forever yours 🌸
